text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the end of the school day, and I'm taking a
walk to reset my mood when...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
All right! Lights and sound are both good. All
that's left is to check the stands...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello! And yeah! My class is having a concert
rehearsal here tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm just having a look around to make sure
everything will run smoothly!
choice_data_list: Whoa. That's really considerate of you.
Whoa. That's really considerate of you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Haha. Thank you! This is technically part of the
class representative's responsibilities.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: So, really, this isn't anything specia—

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you feel that? Is it about to rain?
choice_data_list: You could use this opportunity to take a break.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Let's take shelter inside. Come on,
hurry!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Phew! Looks like both of us managed to stay dry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It looks like it's just a passing shower, so it should
let up soon. Thank goodness for that!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. I can use this time to change the water in
the classroom's flower vase.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I think we may need more chalk too... Oh, and I can't
forget to clean the chalkboard erasers!
choice_data_list: What happened to taking a break?
What happened to taking a break?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I am taking a break. I find it refreshing to do simple tasks.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, excuse me! I'm going to get working
now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I walk past the stage and see the
rehearsal taking place as planned.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'll wrap things up before it really starts
pouring!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: You should head inside so you don't get wet!
choice_data_list: Do you want me to hel—
Do you want me to hel—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Narita Top Road has already rocketed
off through the stands to give each seat a quick
visual inspection.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I found a can! Someone must have forgotten
to recycle it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She efficiently checks the stands and promptly
heads back into the school building after she's
done.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I walk past the stage and see the
rehearsal taking place as planned.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Was the spike tape always this easy to see?
The stage floor looks so clean too...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Right?! The mic is working better than before too!
I wonder if it was Class Rep who did all this?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyone! It's time to begin our rehearsal, so
let's wrap up our conversations and get into a
line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The students respond to her cheerily and quickly
fall in line. It's fantastic how committed Narita
Top Road is to supporting her peers!
